personal.preferred_title: Senior AWS / Python / Spark Data Engineer

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience, including financial-services data platforms, Python/SQL ETL, Spark/PySpark pipelines, cloud migration, and production reliability. Built and supported AWS/Oracle data pipelines that processed telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, enabled advanced analytics and forecasting, and improved operational visibility for banking stakeholders. Strong fit for roles requiring AWS data pipelines, Spark query tuning, legacy-to-cloud modernization, ML/RAG-adjacent data workflows, documentation, controls-aware delivery, and technical leadership.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable data workflows used for capacity planning, analytics, and operational reporting.

Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, and Amazon Redshift for forecasting workloads, supporting cloud migration of legacy analytics processes while preserving data traceability.
Developed PySpark/Spark-style large-scale processing patterns for telemetry and forecasting workloads, including partition-aware processing, data validation, and performance-focused pipeline design.

Migrated heavy Prophet/scikit-learn forecasting workloads from on-prem Oracle patterns toward Redshift-backed cloud processing, improving scalability for parallel forecasting and downstream analytics.
Integrated monitoring and telemetry feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting layers with executive dashboards and operational health views.
Designed reconciliation, data quality, and reporting checks for production analytics datasets, supporting root-cause analysis, incident response, and stakeholder trust in data outputs.
Collaborated with engineering, operations, and business stakeholders to translate infrastructure and risk questions into scalable data products, reports, and technical documentation.
Used AI-assisted development workflows, RAG concepts, and LLM APIs in current projects to accelerate pipeline design, quality gates, job scoring, and structured JSON artifact generation.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, improving transaction visibility and operational diagnosis for engineering teams.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance data to identify optimization opportunities and convert telemetry into actionable engineering recommendations.
Implemented end-user monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile workflows, strengthening reliability analysis for customer-facing systems.
Supported cloud migration planning to AWS by assessing APM readiness, monitoring requirements, and integration patterns for production systems.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment, supporting 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise applications.
Built Perl/Korn shell data-extraction and reporting automation that replaced manual weekly exports and improved operational reporting consistency.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, SLA views, and technical documentation adopted as standards across client environments.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to investigate bottlenecks, analyze telemetry, and improve release and operational readiness.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while maintaining transaction performance and data correctness.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing and SQL access patterns, reducing hardware footprint while preserving sub-second query latency.
Built validation and testing frameworks to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets and phased cutover activities.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON
skills.AWS & Cloud Data: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, AWS Bedrock concepts, CloudWatch concepts, cloud migration patterns, cloud-native data pipeline design
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, PySpark/Spark processing, data pipelines, data modeling, data warehouses, data marts, data lakes, schema design, schema evolution concepts, partitioning, performance tuning, batch processing
skills.ML / AI Data Workflows: scikit-learn, Prophet forecasting, Pandas, NumPy, RAG concepts, LLM API integration, agentic workflow concepts, AI-assisted development, ML-supporting datasets
skills.Reliability & Operations: production support, incident response, monitoring, alerting, runbooks, operational readiness, root-cause analysis, data quality checks, reconciliation, validation, documentation
skills.DevOps & Delivery: Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Docker, ECS deployment concepts, Agile/Scrum, code reviews, technical leadership, stakeholder communication
skills.Databases & Platforms: Oracle, Oracle RAC, SQL / PL/SQL, Redshift, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, Apache Spark, Databricks concepts, Delta Lake concepts
skills.Observability / Telemetry: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics, Dynatrace AppMon, synthetic monitoring, transaction tracing, telemetry analytics, executive dashboards

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, resume/cover tailoring, quality gates, and application tracking, demonstrating RAG-style retrieval, structured output generation, and operational workflow automation.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark capacity forecasting engine that replaced manual forecasting with automated telemetry pipelines, Prophet/scikit-learn models, and Streamlit dashboards for banking-scale infrastructure insights.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS-oriented serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and Bedrock concepts to support ETL, query optimization, AI-assisted analytics, and governed data access.
